name: orchestrator-pattern
description: Coordinate complex Codex work through scoped, model-routed worker roles and evidence-based verification.

interface.longDescription: Split noisy or independent work into scout, verifier, and implementer roles while keeping planning, judgment, and final verification in the root task.
defaultPrompt: Use the orchestrator pattern to split and verify this task.
Delegate exploration, implementation, and checks to scoped workers.
